oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Remote-workspace phase 2: forward the IPC socket + install shell integration remotely so a remote Claude pane gets live busy/idle, auto-title, and OSC-7 pwd tracking (deferred from PR #66).
Daily-drive the shipped app (now v1.5.0) and triage regressions; small follow-up candidates: Reset Name (custom→auto), worktree-leak-on-close, Escape-vs-⌘W placeholder binding.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Released v1.5.0 — Cmd+N binds new-session + fixes Enter/Esc in the create-session popover (e7769b4), and the Session-Overview grid gains a confirm-delete popover plus vim hjkl navigation (13a2b85). Built, notarized (Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast (build 436) live.

Released v1.4.0 — bundles SSH-connected workspaces (PR #66), Session-Overview D/R (delete/rename) keyboard shortcuts (PR #67), and auto-naming worktree sessions from the live Claude title (PR #68). Built, notarized (Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast live.

SSH-connected workspaces (PR #66): a workspace bound to an SSH host runs every session against that host — terminal, Claude pane, git status/branch, Inspect file tree, and reader — over a multiplexed ssh ControlMaster, with the local path unchanged. Git routes remote via a single RemoteExecutionRegistry lookup at GitStatusService's runGit/runProcess choke points; the file tree gets an injected RemoteInspectFileScanner + poller; panes exec `ssh -tt … 'cd <dir> && exec <cmd>'` with Claude launched through `$SHELL -lic` so rc-file PATH resolves and a non-zero remote exit stays visible; the reader fetches bytes via base64/stat. Remote target persisted via schema v7→v8. Security: reject `-`-prefixed ssh hosts (arg-injection) + per-uid mode-700 ControlPath. Verified end-to-end against a live host; full build + 1021 tianTests green. Deferred: remote Claude live busy/idle, auto-title, OSC-7.
